prompt: A traditional Japanese zen garden. A stepping-stone path winds through the garden over raked white gravel and green moss. Lush green trimmed bushes, Japanese maples, and various sculptured plants surround the path. A small koi pond with a flat wooden bridge is visible ahead. The atmosphere is serene and tranquil with soft diffused overcast light filtering through the tree canopy. Beyond the koi pond, a bamboo fence with a low thatched-roof gate marks the garden boundary. A stone water basin (tsukubai) fed by a bamboo spout sits beside the path further ahead, with water trickling gently. Behind the starting viewpoint, a covered wooden veranda of a traditional tea house extends along the garden edge. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, standing on the stepping-stone path and looking forward through the zen garden, with a moss-covered stone lantern visible to the right of the path.

tracking_object.desc: traditional stone lantern beside the stepping-stone path
